decisions.source_threshold_override_reason: A202 integration proof exercises the human review override path for a single official source; production publication still requires owner sign-off or an independent second source.
decisions.attestation: Reviewed endpoint resolution, official source locator, evidence excerpt, empty counter-evidence array, and explicit fixture-only non-production clearance.
